snippet.title: SPIDERMAN BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER BREAKDOWN! Every Easter Egg & Detail You Missed!
snippet.description:

Here is EVERYTHING you missed in the trailer for Spider-Man Brand New Day (2026) - every clue for the MUTANTS, Jean Grey, even ROGUE?? What was removed from this trailer? Will Daredevil appear in this movie? Will Norman Osborn? Will Bruce Banner’s “savage” Hulk form? How will this movie set up Avengers Doomsday and Secret Wars? snippet.title: ROBLOX CLIMB FOR BRAINROTS..
snippet.description:
Today I played Roblox Climb for Brainrots! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.description:
Your biggest Spider-man Brand New Day Questions Answered. SPIDERMAN Brand New Day Official Trailer Breakdown | Easter Eggs, Story Explained & Things You Missed. We breakdown the Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer. This discusses the story, Hulk, Punisher, Sadie Sinks character, MJ, the comics and more.

#Spiderman #BrandNewDay #Trailer #SpidermanBrandNewDay #Marvel #MCU #PlotDetails #PlotLeak #MovieTrailer

Spider-Man: Brand New Day is an upcoming American superhero film based on the Marvel Comics character Spider-Man. Produced by Columbia Pictures, Marvel Studios, and Pascal Pictures, and distributed by Sony Pictures Releasing, it is intended to be the 38th film in the Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU) and the fourth film in the MCU Spider-Man film series following Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021). The film is being directed by Destin Daniel Cretton, written by Chris McKenna and Erik Sommers, and stars Tom Holland as Peter Parker / Spider-Man alongside Zendaya, Jacob Batalon, Sadie Sink, Liza Colón-Zayas, Jon Bernthal, Mark Ruffalo, Michael Mando, Tramell Tillman, and Marvin Jones III. In the film, Parker anonymously protects New York City as the hero Spider-Man and uncovers a larger mystery while investigating a series of crimes.

Ok so the Spider-man Brand New Day trailer has a lot of things going on with it. There’s lots of major questions that people have around the movie and in this video I kinda wanna do a big theory time…theory time…theory time about what could be happening in the movie. Now it has been rumoured that the film will see the return of The Savage Hulk and that this is who Punisher and the convoy are hunting. Mark Ruffalo also features heavily in the teaser and I believe that while studying Peters Mutation he will unwittingly unleash his darker former self.

Now in the teaser we do so that he has his inhibitator on which was first shown to us in She Hulk. This stops him from Transforming and when broken it sends him back to being the big green giant. Though we have seen in the past that this turns him back to the smart hulk I do believe studying Peters mutation might have some adverse side effects. If you want to learn more about whats going on with the mutation in general then check out the video MT has done on the channel. There he talks about the hand and resurrection elixir and how that could potentially mutate the character. I dont wanna go over that cos yeah..video up already but I do think that the mutation will also be something that reverts Bruce Banner.

snippet.title: ONE SPOON OF CHOCOLATE Official Trailer (2026) Quentin Tarantino Presents, RZA
snippet.description:
Only in theaters May 1, 2026

RZA’S ONE SPOON OF CHOCOLATE follows Unique (Shameik Moore, “Dope” and voice of Miles Morales in the Spider-Verse films), a veteran and ex-convict seeking a fresh start in a small town. After an altercation with a gang of locals, he starts to suspect they may have something to do with the disappearance of young men in the area - including his cousin. 

As he digs for the truth, he finds himself the target of not only the gang, but the local sheriff’s office, whose involvement in the disappearances may be even more sinister. Instead of waiting for his turn to be picked off, Unique and those closest to him (Paris Jackson, RJ Cyler) decide to fight back in this sharply satirical and stylish action thriller from the visionary leader of the Wu-Tang Clan.

snippet.title: WILD HORSE NINE | Official Trailer | Searchlight Pictures
snippet.description:
In theaters November 6, 2026. 

Shortly before the 1973 Chilean coup, CIA agents Chris (John Malkovich) and Lee (Sam Rockwell) are dispatched from Santiago to Easter island by their bureau chief, MJ (Steve Buscemi). Amongst the Island's iconic statues, and as the longtime partners wrestle with their dark pasts and present conspiracies, Chris's newfound bond with a pair of rebellious students (Mariana di Girolamo and Ailín Salas) threatens to send everyone’s trip to this remote paradise sideways.

Directed by: Martin McDonagh
Written by: Martin McDonagh
Produced by: Graham Broadbent, Pete Czernin, Martin McDonagh, Anita Overland
Cast: John Malkovich, Sam Rockwell, Steve Buscemi, Mariana di Girolamo, Ailín Salas, with Tom Waits, and Parker Posey

snippet.title: Balls Up - Official Red Band Trailer (2026) Mark Wahlberg, Paul Walter Hauser, Sacha Baron Cohen
snippet.description:
Don't miss the Red Band Trailer for Balls Up, a comedy film distributed by Amazon MGM Studios. Secure a condom sponsorship with the World Cup in Balls Up, streaming on April 15 exclusively on Amazon Prime Video.

In Balls Up, marketing executives Brad and Elijah go “balls out” and pitch a bold full‑coverage condom sponsorship with the World Cup. After their drunken celebration in Brazil sparks a global scandal, they must outrun furious fans, criminals, and power-hungry officials to salvage their careers and make it home alive.

Balls Up stars Mark Wahlberg, Paul Walter Hauser, Benjamin Bratt, Eva De Dominici, Daniela Melchior, with Molly Shannon, Sacha Baron Cohen, and Eric André. The film is directed by Peter Farrelly and produced by David Ellison, Dana Goldberg, Don Granger, Andrew Muscato, Paul Wernick, and Rhett Reese.

Balls Up is streaming on April 15 exclusively on Amazon Prime Video.

localized.description:
Don't miss the Red Band Trailer for Balls Up, a comedy film distributed by Amazon MGM Studios. Secure a condom sponsorship with the World Cup in Balls Up, streaming on April 15 exclusively on Amazon Prime Video.

In Balls Up, marketing executives Brad and Elijah go “balls out” and pitch a bold full‑coverage condom sponsorship with the World Cup. After their drunken celebration in Brazil sparks a global scandal, they must outrun furious fans, criminals, and power-hungry officials to salvage their careers and make it home alive.

Balls Up stars Mark Wahlberg, Paul Walter Hauser, Benjamin Bratt, Eva De Dominici, Daniela Melchior, with Molly Shannon, Sacha Baron Cohen, and Eric André. The film is directed by Peter Farrelly and produced by David Ellison, Dana Goldberg, Don Granger, Andrew Muscato, Paul Wernick, and Rhett Reese.

Balls Up is streaming on April 15 exclusively on Amazon Prime Video.

snippet.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day - Trailer 2 (2026) Tom Holland, Sadie Sink, Mark Ruffalo (Concept Version)
snippet.description:
► Here's our concept trailer for "Spider-Man: Brand New Day"

► In this concept trailer for Spider Man Brand New Day, Peter Parker played by Tom Holland faces the consequences of a life erased from memory as he commits himself entirely to protecting New York, only to discover that the growing strain of constant crime fighting is triggering dangerous changes within his own body. Seeking answers from Bruce Banner played by Mark Ruffalo, Peter is drawn into a deeper crisis as a mysterious telepathic presence in the form of Jean Grey played by Sadie Sink begins to influence events across the city, raising questions about whether she is a threat or an unexpected ally. At the same time, the calculating crime lord Tombstone played by Marvin Krondon Jones the Third quietly positions himself to benefit from rising instability, shaping a new criminal order that tests Peter’s limits and his sense of responsibility. As his powers become less predictable and his methods more severe, Peter must confront the cost of surrendering his personal identity in pursuit of being Spider Man at all times, while those closest to his past, including MJ played by Zendaya, sense that something about the hero they once knew has begun to change.

snippet.title: TOM HOLLAND'S FIRST "Spider-Man: Brand New Day" INTERVIEW at the EMPIRE STATE BUILDING
snippet.description:
Tom Holland stopped by New York City's top attraction to debut the official trailer for “Spider-Man: Brand New Day” and light the building in blue and red to celebrate. After the lighting ceremony, Holland sat down for an exclusive conversation about Peter Parker's next chapter, what it means to grow up on screen, and why this film might just be the best one yet.
